task_completion.description: Verify that Epi Info 7 Classic Analysis is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Epi Info 7 Classic Analysis application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that the study population data is loaded into Epi Info.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The READ command or data grid in Epi Info shows 'doctors_smokers.csv' being accessed or loaded from 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\EpiData\'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the reference rates data is loaded or linked for the SMR calculation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Commands, dialog boxes, or output in Epi Info showing 'nonsmoker_rates.csv' being accessed or used as a reference table.

task_completion.description: Verify that the SMR calculation is performed in Epi Info.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Epi Info output window displays the results of an SMR (Standardized Mortality Ratio) calculation, explicitly showing the calculated SMR value and expected deaths.

task_completion.description: Verify that a text report containing the SMR value and total expected deaths is saved to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., Notepad) or file explorer showing a file named 'smr_report.txt' saved in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\EpiData\', and the file contents include the SMR value and total expected deaths.

integrity.description: The agent used Epi Info 7 Classic Analysis to perform the calculation rather than writing a standalone script to bypass the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Epi Info 7 GUI (menus, dialog boxes, or the Classic Analysis command interface).

integrity.description: The agent actually calculated the SMR using the provided CSV files rather than fabricating the numbers.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Epi Info output window shows the generated SMR statistics, and these exact numbers are the ones copied into the final text report.

integrity.description: The agent used the exact file paths specified in the prompt for inputs and outputs.
integrity.visual_evidence: File paths visible in Epi Info's READ/link commands and the text editor's save dialog exactly match the 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\EpiData\' directory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified report path: C:\Users\Docker\Documents\EpiData\smr_report.txt. The dataset is a reconstructed version of the landmark 1956 Doll & Hill study on British doctors (PubMed ID 13364389). Because the dataset is synthetic/reconstructed, the calculated SMR and expected deaths may not match historical records (e.g., historical SMR is 15.9). The VLM must rely on the values actually generated by the Epi Info software in the screenshots to verify the final report's accuracy.
